tasks.description: Fix war record phase matching to be case-insensitive
tasks.changes: In addWarRecord, change all phase comparisons to be case-insensitive: replace `phase.startsWith('Builder')` with `phase.toLowerCase().startsWith('builder')`, `phase.startsWith('Peltast')` with `phase.toLowerCase().startsWith('peltast')`, `phase === 'Slinger'` with `phase.toLowerCase() === 'slinger'`, `phase === 'Hoplite'` with `phase.toLowerCase() === 'hoplite'`, `phase === 'Scout'` with `phase.toLowerCase() === 'scout'`. Also make role comparisons case-insensitive the same way.

tasks.description: Call loadAggregated on verdict, task_status, and run_end events so stats auto-update
tasks.changes: In handleEvent, add `loadAggregated()` calls for event types: `verdict`, `task_status`, and `run_end`. Currently loadAggregated() is only called on `subagent_done`. Add it to the verdict, task_status, and run_end branches so the aggregated stats panel refreshes whenever task state changes.

tasks.description: Remove ensureWatchOpen() call from helot_run handler — watch terminal is replaced by browser dashboard
tasks.changes: In the helot_run tool handler (around line 342), remove the `ensureWatchOpen()` call. The old watch terminal is no longer needed — the browser dashboard at port 7771 replaces it. Keep the ensureWatchOpen function definition in case it is needed later, just do not call it automatically on every helot_run invocation.

tasks.description: Prevent browser from reopening on every MCP server restart
tasks.changes: In the server.listen callback, before calling `exec('start http://...')` (or `exec('open ...')` on mac), check a sentinel file: `const sentinelPath = path.join(stateDir, 'dashboard.opened'); const shouldOpen = !fs.existsSync(sentinelPath) || (Date.now() - fs.statSync(sentinelPath).mtimeMs > 60_000);`. If shouldOpen is true, write the sentinel file (`fs.writeFileSync(sentinelPath, String(Date.now()))`) and then exec the browser open. If shouldOpen is false, skip the exec. This prevents the browser tab from reopening on every /mcp reconnect.
